results.description: RuntimeLocal._state_store resolved via auto_configure_registry + ModelONEXContainer, NOT hardcoded
results.evidence: _bootstrap_state_store() at runtime_local.py constructs ModelONEXContainer, calls auto_configure_registry(container, state_root=...), resolves via container.service_registry.resolve_service(ProtocolStateStore). No direct ServiceStateDisk instantiation in RuntimeLocal.

results.description: Persistence gated on contract.node_type == 'reducer' AND dict output shape
results.evidence: _persist_reducer_projection_if_applicable() checks both is_reducer_contract (contract.node_type.lower()=='reducer') AND is_reducer_output_shape (isinstance dict + 'state' key + intents is list). Both must be True.

results.description: Defensive log for dict-shape-without-reducer-contract case (no persist)
results.evidence: test_non_reducer_contract_with_dict_state_does_not_persist PASSES — compute-typed contract returning reducer-shape dict does NOT create state.yaml. Runtime logs debug message and returns.

results.description: NO fallbacks — runtime fails loud if state store bootstrap fails
results.evidence: Per user directive mid-task: removed all try/except around bootstrap + put(). ImportError, ModelOnexError, registry errors, and put() failures all propagate. Silent degrade was the exact bug class this task exists to fix.

results.description: Full runtime + cli + new tests: 363 pass
results.evidence: uv run pytest tests/unit/runtime/ tests/test_runtime_local_reducer_state_sink.py -q --timeout=30 → 363 passed, 1 warning in 13.99s. No regressions.
